overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a neon-lit futuristic city district. The player character navigates sidewalks, ascends stairs to view towering architecture, explores a street market, and crosses a busy intersection with flying vehicles overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city sidewalk with street vendors and neon signage

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and street stalls with the RC building visible ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking past camera toward the foreground
group of pedestrians walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: large green and black futuristic building with prominent RC logo and tiered architecture
elevated highway or monorail structure crossing above the street
yellow and black striped construction barriers lining the sidewalk edge
tall digital advertisements and neon signs on building facades

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bustling cyberpunk city sidewalk with the iconic RC building dominating the distant view. The camera moves forward past construction barricades and street vendors, with neon billboards illuminating the right side and moderate pedestrian traffic flowing in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand entrance stairs of commercial building with illuminated railings

events.description: character turns left and begins ascending the wide illuminated stairs
camera pans upward from shadowed entrance into bright sky exposure
flying vehicle passes overhead against the blue sky between skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: ascending the illuminated stairs while looking up at the towering architecture and sky

entered.detail: tall blue-tinted glass building with multiple floors and exterior lighting
wide concrete staircase with orange glowing railings on both sides
vertical illuminated sign reading CHIP SERVICE on the building facade
futuristic hovering car flying between the skyscrapers overhead

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand illuminated stairs of a blue glass commercial building, leaving the street level behind. The camera pans upward to reveal towering architecture against a clear sky, with a flying vehicle passing overhead between the smokestacks and neon-lit facades.

scene_state.functional_zone: open-air market with vendor stalls and outdoor dining area

events.description: descending to street level and entering the Wagami Market area with vendor stalls

agents.ego_description: navigating through the market area, passing ceramic vendors and outdoor seating while heading toward the street

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind stall displaying ceramic vases and goods
pedestrian in white shirt walking through the outdoor seating area

entered.detail: wooden vendor stalls with awnings displaying various goods and ceramics
red vertical banner with black WAGAMI MARKET text and logo
plastic chairs and tables with green umbrellas arranged for dining
white and blue decorative vases displayed on a market table

segments.scene_description: Returning to street level, the scene transitions into the Wagami Market area with red banners and vendor stalls selling ceramics. The camera moves past outdoor seating with green umbrellas and scattered pedestrians browsing the market, with the RC building visible again in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with crosswalk and elevated highway

events.description: crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk as vehicles pass through the intersection
camera pans upward to view the RC building facade against the afternoon sky

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while observing traffic and approaching the RC building complex

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving through the intersection from left to right
pedestrian standing at the crosswalk corner waiting to cross

entered.detail: wide crosswalk with bold yellow diagonal stripes marking the pedestrian crossing
futuristic cars and sedans driving along the multi-lane street
raised highway structure with support columns crossing above the road

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character crossing the wide yellow-striped crosswalk with moderate traffic passing by. After crossing, the camera pans upward to admire the imposing RC building rising against the clear afternoon sky, with elevated highways and digital billboards framing the futuristic cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a neon-lit futuristic district that shifts from a crowded sidewalk to towering heights and back down into a vibrant street market. It begins by moving past construction barricades and glowing billboards on a bustling sidewalk, with the imposing RC building anchoring the distant horizon. As the camera ascends the illuminated stairs of a blue glass commercial building, the perspective opens upward to reveal soaring architecture and a flying vehicle gliding between smokestacks against a clear sky. The scene then descends back to street level, transitioning into the Wagami Market where red banners and ceramic stalls replace the corporate glass, moving past green umbrellas and browsing pedestrians. Finally, the camera crosses a wide yellow-striped intersection before panning upward one last time to frame the massive RC building beneath elevated highways and digital displays.
